[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111010 6
1 0011010000 3
2 1010100100 4
3 0111011011 7
4 1011011111 8
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0111111110 8

01 1111111110 9

23 1111100111 8
34 1111111111 a

56 1010100100 4 match 2
67 0111111011 8
70 1011011111 8 match 4
